# Feature Request

## User job

Describe the task this should help with, such as making an instrumental, keeping backing vocals, or reducing one instrument.

## Current problem

Describe what StemStudio makes awkward or unclear today.

## Proposed change

Describe the change you want.

## Boundaries

- [ ] This keeps StemStudio as a local macOS desktop app.
- [ ] This does not require accounts, hosted storage, billing, remote workers, or public file URLs.
- [ ] This does not expand YouTube import into a hosted downloader service.
